title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Urban Ladder

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Urban Ladder
jsonLd.description:
Join the Urban Ladder family as a SEO Specialist in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Urban Ladder:
Urban Ladder is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Ladder!
